positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene silhouette, featuring highly detailed autumnal leaves, wandering woodland creatures (raccoons, foxes, deer), and fairytale glowing mushrooms. The composition is centrally balanced and highly intricate, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Style: Modern botanical illustration meets art deco engraving. Lighting: Soft, warm, diffused golden hour glow emanating from the mushrooms. Color direction: Rich jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amber) contrasted with deep matte blacks for the silhouette lines. High contrast, clean vector lines, isolated elements, seamless repeating pattern aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low detail, photorealism, messy, gradient, cartoon, signature
